name: TURBO
summary: TURBO-MECH BHD is a Malaysia-based company specializing in the supply, installation, and maintenance of rotating equipment such as pumps, turbines, and compressors. The company caters to various industries, including oil and gas, petrochemical, and power generation. Turbo-Mech Bhd is headquartered in Shah Alam, Selangor, Malaysia.
